description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with gray and brown accents, featuring a mix of solid walls and open spaces. There is a partially covered patio area with wooden slats, visible outdoor seating, and landscaped elements including shrubs, small trees, and flower beds. The house has a main entryway with a small overhang and a driveway leading to a garage. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, providing a contemporary look. The landscaping is minimalistic, with decorative plants and a low boundary wall at the front.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and minimalistic landscaping. Features include a covered patio, garage, and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, covered patio, and landscaped front yard with decorative plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white walls, minimal window openings, and landscaping elements extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio area, additional landscaping, and a clearer view of the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible greenery, the side of the garage, and the continuation of the flat roof and wall design.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, single door, and adjacent garage; minimal steps and no porch, emphasizing clean lines.
